videos.headline: Schmid's rushing TD gives Sam Houston a late fourth-quarter lead
videos.description: Sam Houston quarterback Eric Schmid takes it himself for a 6-yard rushing touchdown that gives the Bearkats a 24-20 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Schmid's rushing TD gives Sam Houston a late fourth-quarter lead) 2021/05/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Houston's Jefferson runs in a TD
videos.description: Ramon Jefferson runs in a 1-yard touchdown to increase the Bearkats' lead over the Biston.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Houston's Jefferson runs in a TD) 2021/05/02 ESHEET
